name: l2_powered_source_acceptance_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceAcceptanceHandoff summarizes validation-run candidates and skipped-run blockers before hover and cruise acceptance gates.
note: Acceptance handoff evidence layer.

name: l2_powered_source_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceValidationRunMatrix records skipped passed and failed validation runs with blocker provenance.
note: Validation run status and skipped blocker provenance consumed by this handoff.

name: l2_powered_source_result_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceResultSeed proves whether validation inputs are available.
note: Seed readiness upstream of validation runs.

name: l2_powered_hover_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverAcceptanceGate consumes complete passing hover validation results.
note: Hover acceptance gate target.

name: l2_powered_cruise_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseAcceptanceGate consumes complete passing cruise validation results.
note: Cruise acceptance gate target.

name: l2_powered_source_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredSourceRequestReadinessGate blocks powered-source request execution until API and envelope evidence are ready.
note: Request readiness boundary upstream of validation evidence.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered body-force or porous-source request support.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered source acceptance evidence.

name: powered_source_acceptance_handoff
value: Forward validation output to hover or cruise acceptance gates only when all four expected presets are present as passing acceptance candidates; skipped missing failed or unexpected rows keep the handoff blocked while skipped rows carry their dominant blocker.
note: Method keeps acceptance gate inputs separate from missing powered-run evidence and gameplay tuning.
